---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Raino
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the current situation and why it is insufficient. If this relates to an existing issue, link it here.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you want. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? If so, why are they not sufficient?

## Component

Which part of Raino would this affect?

- [ ] Studio app (apps/studio)
- [ ] Marketing site (apps/site)
- [ ] Core schemas (packages/core)
- [ ] RAG pipeline (packages/rag)
- [ ] Agents/orchestration (packages/agents)
- [ ] UI components (packages/ui)
- [ ] Supplier clients (packages/supplier-clients)
- [ ] KiCad worker (packages/kicad-worker-client)
- [ ] Ingest worker (services/ingest-worker)
- [ ] Design worker (services/design-worker)
- [ ] Quote worker (services/quote-worker)
- [ ] Audit worker (services/audit-worker)
- [ ] New package/service
- [ ] Other:

## Willing to Contribute

- [ ] Yes, I would like to submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] No, I am only suggesting the idea
